description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced knowledge of Regular Expressions, covering basic patterns, quantifiers, groups, and look-around assertions. It uses an engaging, playful tone to challenge problem-solving skills and reinforce mastery through practice.
Topics: Basic patterns, Quantifiers, Groups, Look-around assertions, String matching, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers with intermediate knowledge of Regular Expressions seeking to enhance their pattern-matching and validation skills.
